---
title: Routing concepts
---
<style>
table {
  table-layout: fixed;
  width: 100%;
}
td, th {
  word-wrap: break-word;
}
</style>

Standard names for flow state variables in the Tables below that contain `instantaneous` in
the `quantity` part of the standard name can be valid for an internal time step (depending
on the model time simulation time step) and thus considered instantaneous compared to the
model simulation time step Īt $\SIb{}{s}$. These flow state variables can also be specified
as a model output variable.

## Reservoirs

#### Generic input {#input-generic-reservoir}
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ----- | -- | -- |
| `reservoir_location__count` | Outlet of the reservoirs in which each reservoir has a unique id | - | - |
| `reservoir_area__count` | Reservoir coverage | - | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ----- | -- | -- |
| `reservoir_surface__area` | Area of the reservoir | mĀ² | - |
| `reservoir_water__max_volume` | Maximum volume (above which water is spilled) | mĀ³ | - |
| `reservoir_water__rating_curve_coefficient` | Rating curve coefficient | - | - |
| `reservoir_water__rating_curve_exponent` | Rating curve exponent | - | - |
| `reservoir_water_flow_threshold_level__elevation` | Water level threshold, below this level outflow is zero | m | - |
| `reservoir_lower_location__count` | Index of lower reservoir (linked reservoir) | - | 0 |
| `reservoir_water__storage_curve_type_count` | Type of reservoir storage curve | - | - |
| `reservoir_water__rating_curve_type_count` | Type of reservoir rating curve | - | - |
| `reservoir_water_surface__initial_elevation` | Water level of reservoir (used for initialization) | m | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Static or cyclic/forcing input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ----- | -- | -- |
| `reservoir_water_demand__required_downstream_volume_flow_rate` | Minimum (environmental) flow released from reservoir | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ | - |
| `reservoir_water_release_below_spillway__max_volume_flow_rate` | Maximum amount that can be released if below spillway | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ | - |
| `reservoir_water__target_full_volume_fraction` | Target fraction full (of max storage) | - | - |
| `reservoir_water__target_min_volume_fraction` | Target minimum full fraction (of max storage)	| - | - |
| `reservoir_water__external_inflow_volume_flow_rate` | External inflow reservoir (negative for abstractions) | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ | - |
| `reservoir_water__outgoing_observed_volume_flow_rate` | Observed outflow reservoir | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### States
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `reservoir_water_surface__elevation` | Reservoir water level | m |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `reservoir_water__volume` | Reservoir volume | mĀ³ |
| `reservoir_water_surface__elevation` | Reservoir water level | m |
| `reservoir_water__outgoing_volume_flow_rate` | Outflow of the reservoir | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `reservoir_water__incoming_volume_flow_rate` | Inflow into the reservoir | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `reservoir_water__evaporation_volume_flux` | Average actual evaporation over the reservoir area | mm Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `reservoir_water__precipitation_volume_flux` | Average precipitation over the reservoir area | mm Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `reservoir_water__potential_evaporation_volume_flux` | Average potential evaporation over the reservoir area | mm Ītā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}

## Kinematic wave
### River flow
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `river__length` | River length | m | - |
| `river__width` | River width | m | - |
| `river_water_flow__manning_n_parameter` | Manningās roughness | s m$^{-\frac{1}{3}}$ | 0.036 |
| `river_bank_water__depth` | Bankfull river depth | m | 1.0 |
| `river__slope` | River slope | m mā»Ā¹ | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Static or cyclic/forcing input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `river_water__external_inflow_volume_flow_rate` | External inflow into the river (negative for abstractions) | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### States
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `river_water__instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | River discharge | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water__depth` | River water depth | m |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `river_water__volume_flow_rate` | River discharge | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water__instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | River discharge | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water__volume` | River water volume | mĀ³ |
| `river_water__depth` | River water depth | m |
| `river_water__lateral_inflow_volume_flow_rate` | Lateral inflow into the river | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water__external_abstraction_volume_flow_rate` | Actual abstraction based on external negative inflow | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ | - |
: {.striped .hover}

### Overland flow
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `land_surface_water_flow__manning_n_parameter` | Manningās roughness | s m$^{-\frac{1}{3}}$ | 0.072 |
| `land_surface__slope` | Land surface slope | m mā»Ā¹ | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### States
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `land_surface_water__instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | Discharge overland flow | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water__depth` | Water depth overland flow | m |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `land_surface_water__volume_flow_rate` | Discharge overland flow | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water__instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | Discharge overland flow | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water__to_river_volume_flow_rate` | Discharge overland flow that flows to the river | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water__volume` | Water volume overland flow | mĀ³ |
| `land_surface_water__depth` | Water depth overland flow | m |
: {.striped .hover}


### Lateral subsurface flow
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `subsurface_water__horizontal_to_vertical_saturated_hydraulic_conductivity_ratio` | A multiplication factor applied to vertical hydraulic conductivity | - | - |
| `land_surface__slope` | Land surface slope | m mā»Ā¹ | - |
| `land_surface__elevation` | Land surface elevation | m |
: {.striped .hover}

#### States
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `subsurface_water__instanteneous_volume_flow_rate` | Subsurface flow | mĀ³ dayā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `subsurface_water__volume_flow_rate` | Subsurface flow | mĀ³ dayā»Ā¹ |
| `subsurface_water_saturated_zone_top__depth` | Pseudo-water table depth (top of the saturated zone) | m |
| `subsurface_water__exfiltration_volume_flux` | Exfiltration (groundwater above surface level, saturated excess conditions) | m Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `subsurface_water__hydraulic_head` | Hydraulic head | m |
| `subsurface_water__to_river_volume_flow_rate` | Part of subsurface flow that flows to the river | mĀ³ dayā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}

## Local inertial
### River flow
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `river__length` | River length | m | - |
| `model_boundary_condition_river__length` | Boundary condition river length downstream river outlets | m | 10 000 |
| `river__width` | River width | m | - |
| `model_boundary_condition_river_bank_water__depth` | Boundary condition bankfull depth downstream river outlets | m | 0.0 |
| `river_bank_water__elevation` | Bankfull elevation of the river | m | - |
| `river_bank_water__depth` | Bankfull depth of the river | m | - |
| `river_water_flow__manning_n_parameter` | Manningās roughness | s m$^{-\frac{1}{3}}$ | 0.0036 |
| `river_water__external_inflow_volume_flow_rate` | External inflow into the river (negative for abstractions) | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### States
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `river_water__instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | River discharge | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water__depth` | River water depth | m |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `river_water__volume_flow_rate` | River (+ floodplain) discharge | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water__instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | River discharge | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water__depth` | River water depth | m |
| `river_water__volume` | River water volume | mĀ³ |
| `river_water__external_abstraction_volume_flow_rate` | Actual abstraction based on external negative inflow | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ | - |
: {.striped .hover}

### 1D floodplain flow
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `floodplain_water__sum_of_volume_per_depth` | Floodplain profile (cumulative volume per flood depth) | mĀ³ | - |
| `floodplain_water_flow__manning_n_parameter` | Manningās roughness | s m$^{-\frac{1}{3}}$ | 0.072 |
: {.striped .hover}

#### States
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | |
| --- | --- | - |
| `floodplain_water__instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | Floodplain discharge | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `floodplain_water__depth` | Floodplain water depth | m |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `floodplain_water__volume` | Floodplain volume | mĀ³ |
| `floodplain_water__depth` | Floodplain water depth | m |
| `floodplain_water__volume_flow_rate` | Floodplain discharge | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `floodplain_water__instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | Floodplain discharge | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}

### Overland flow
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `land_surface_water_flow__manning_n_parameter` | Manningās roughness | s m$^{-\frac{1}{3}}$ | 0.072 |
| `land_surface_water_flow__ground_elevation` | Elevation of each cell | m | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### States
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | ---- | - |
| `land_surface_water__x_component_of_instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | Flow in x direction | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water__y_component_of_instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | Flow in y direction | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water__depth` | Water depth | m |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `land_surface_water__x_component_of_instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | Flow in x direction | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water__y_component_of_instantaneous_volume_flow_rate` | Flow in y direction | mĀ³ sā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water__depth` | Water depth | m |
| `land_surface_water__volume` | Total surface water storage of cell (including river storage for river cells) | mĀ³ |
: {.striped .hover}

## Groundwater flow
### Unconfined aquifer
#### Input {#input-gwf-unconfined}
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `land_surface__elevation ` | Land surface elevation conductivity | m | - |
| `subsurface_surface_water__horizontal_saturated_hydraulic_conductivity` | Horizontal conductivity | m dayā»Ā¹ | - |
| `subsurface__horizontal_saturated_hydraulic_conductivity_scale_parameter` | Factor controlling the reduction of horizontal conductivity with depth | - | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### States{#state-gwf-unconfined}
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `subsurface_water__hydraulic_head` | Groundwater head | m |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `subsurface_water__hydraulic_head` | Groundwater head | m |
| `subsurface_water__exfiltration_volume_flux` | Exfiltration (groundwater above surface level, saturated excess conditions) | m Ītā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}

## Subsurface flow boundaries
Boundary conditions for both the groundwater flow and lateral subsurface flow concepts. The
constant head boundary can only be applied as part of the groundwater flow concept.

### River boundary
#### Input {#input-gwf-river}
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `river_water__infiltration_conductance` | River bed infiltration conductance | mĀ² dayā»Ā¹ | - |
| `river_water__exfiltration_conductance` | River bed exfiltration conductance | mĀ² dayā»Ā¹ | - |
| `river_bottom__elevation` | River bottom elevation | m | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output {#output-gwf-river}
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `river_water__to_subsurface_volume_flow_rate` | Exchange flux (river to aquifer) | mĀ³ dayā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}

### Drainage boundary
#### Input {#input-gwf-drainage}
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `land_drain__elevation` | Drain elevation | m | - |
| `land_drain__conductance` | Drain conductance | mĀ² dayā»Ā¹ | - |
| `land_drain_location__mask` | Drain location | - | - |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output {#output-gwf-drainage}
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `land_drain_water__to_subsurface_volume_flow_rate` | Exchange flux (drain to aquifer) | mĀ³ dayā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}

### Recharge boundary
#### Output {#output-gwf-recharge}
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `subsurface_water_saturated_zone_top__net_recharge_volume_flow_rate` | Net recharge flux | mĀ³ dayā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}

### Constant head boundary
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `model_constant_boundary_condition__hydraulic_head` | Head of the boundary | m | - |
: {.striped .hover}

## Sediment
### Transport capacity Overland flow
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `sediment__particle_density` | Particle density | kg mā»Ā³ | 2650.0 |
| `land_surface_sediment__median_diameter` | Particle median diameter | mm | 0.1 |
| `clay__mean_diameter` | Clay mean diameter | Ī¼m | 2.0 |
| `silt__mean_diameter` | Silt mean diameter | Ī¼m | 10.0 |
| `sand__mean_diameter` | Sand mean diameter | Ī¼m | 200.0 |
| `sediment_small_aggregates__mean_diameter` | Small aggregates mean diameter | Ī¼m | 30.0 |
| `sediment_large_aggregates__mean_diameter` | Large aggregates mean diameter | Ī¼m | 500.0 |
| `land_surface_water_sediment__govers_transport_capacity_coefficient` | Govers transport capacity coefficient | - | 0.000505 |
| `land_surface_water_sediment__govers_transport_capacity_exponent` | Govers transport capacity exponent | - | 4.27 |
: {.striped .hover}

### Transport capacity River
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `river_sediment__median_diameter` | Particle median diameter | mm | 0.1 |
| `river_water_sediment__bagnold_transport_capacity_coefficient` | Bagnold transport capacity coefficient | - | - |
| `river_water_sediment__bagnold_transport_capacity_exponent` | Bagnold transport capacity exponent | - | - |
| `river_water_sediment__kodatie_transport_capacity_a_coefficient` | Kodatie transport capacity coefficient a | - | - |
| `river_water_sediment__kodatie_transport_capacity_b_coefficient` | Kodatie transport capacity coefficient b | - | - |
| `river_water_sediment__kodatie_transport_capacity_c_coefficient` | Kodatie transport capacity coefficient c | - | - |
| `river_water_sediment__kodatie_transport_capacity_d_coefficient` | Kodatie transport capacity coefficient d | - | - |
: {.striped .hover}

### Overland flow transport
#### Output
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `land_surface_water_sediment_transport_capacity__mass_flow_rate` | Total sediment transport capacity | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water_clay_transport_capacity__mass_flow_rate` | Clay transport capacity | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water_sediment__to_river_mass_flow_rate` | Total sediment flux flowing into the river | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water_clay__to_river_mass_flow_rate` | Clay flux flowing into the river | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water_silt__to_river_mass_flow_rate` | Silt flux flowing into the river | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water_sand__to_river_mass_flow_rate` | Sand flux flowing into the river | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water_small_aggregates__to_river_mass_flow_rate` | Small aggregates flux flowing into the river | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water_large_aggregates__to_river_mass_flow_rate` | Large aggregates flux flowing into the river | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `land_surface_water_sediment__mass_flow_rate` | Total sediment flux | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}

### River erosion
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `river_bottom_and_bank_sediment__median_diameter` | Median diameter in the river bed/bank | mm | 0.1
: {.striped .hover}

### River transport
#### Input
| Standard Name | Description | Unit | Default |
| ------ | ---- | -- | -- |
| `reservoir_surface__area` | Reservoir surface area | mĀ² | - |
| `reservoir_water_sediment__bedload_trapping_efficiency` | Reservoir sediment bedload trapping efficiency | - | 1.0 |
| `river_bottom_and_bank_clay__mass_fraction` | River bed/bank content clay | - | 0.15 |
| `river_bottom_and_bank_silt__mass_fraction` | River bed/bank content silt | - | 0.65 |
| `river_bottom_and_bank_sand__mass_fraction` | River bed/bank content sand | - | 0.15 |
| `river_bottom_and_bank_gravel__mass_fraction` | River bed/bank content gravel | - | 0.05 |
| `clay__mean_diameter` | Clay mean diameter | Āµm | 2.0 |
| `silt__mean_diameter` | Silt mean diameter | Āµm | 10.0 |
| `sand__mean_diameter` | Sand mean diameter | Āµm | 200.0 |
| `sediment_small_aggregates__mean_diameter` | Small aggregates mean diameter | Āµm | 30.0 |
| `sediment_large_aggregates__mean_diameter` | Large aggregates mean diameter | Āµm | 500.0 |
| `gravel__mean_diameter` | Gravel mean diameter | Āµm | 2000.0 |
: {.striped .hover}

#### States
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `river_bed_clay__mass` | Clay stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_bed_silt__mass` | Silt stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_bed_sand__mass` | Sand stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_bed_small_aggregates__mass` | Small aggregates stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_bed_large_aggregates__mass` | Large aggregates stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_bed_gravel__mass` | Gravel stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_water_clay__mass` | Clay left in cell | ton |
| `river_water_silt__mass` | Silt left in cell | ton |
| `river_water_sand__mass` | Sand left in cell | ton |
| `river_water_small_aggregates__mass` | Small aggregates left in cell | ton |
| `river_water_large_aggregates__mass` | Large aggregates left in cell | ton |
| `river_water_gravel__mass` | Gravel left in cell | ton? |
| `river_water_clay__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (clay) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_silt__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (silt) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_sand__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (sand) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_small_aggregates__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (small aggregates) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_large_aggregates__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (large aggregates) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_gravel__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (gravel) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}

#### Output
| Standard Name | Description | Unit |
| --- | --- | - |
| `river_bed_clay__mass` | Clay stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_bed_silt__mass` | Silt stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_bed_sand__mass` | Sand stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_bed_small_aggregates__mass` | Small aggregates stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_bed_large_aggregates__mass` | Large aggregates stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_bed_gravel__mass` | Gravel stored on the river bed after deposition | ton |
| `river_water_clay__mass` | Clay left in cell | ton |
| `river_water_silt__mass` | Silt left in cell | ton |
| `river_water_sand__mass` | Sand left in cell | ton |
| `river_water_small_aggregates__mass` | Small aggregates left in cell | ton |
| `river_water_large_aggregates__mass` | Large aggregates left in cell | ton |
| `river_water_gravel__mass` | Gravel left in cell | ton? |
| `river_water_clay__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (clay) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_silt__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (silt) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_sand__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (sand) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_small_aggregates__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (small aggregates) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_large_aggregates__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (large aggregates) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_gravel__mass_flow_rate` | Sediment flux (gravel) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_sediment__bedload_mass_concentration` | Bed load sediment concentration in the river | g mā»Ā³ |
| `river_water_sediment__suspended_mass_concentration` | Suspended sediemnt concentration in the river | g mā»Ā³ |
| `river_water_sediment__mass_concentration` | Total sediment concentration in the river | g mā»Ā³ |
| `river_water_sediment_erosion__mass` | Total sediment erosion (from store + direct river bed/bank) | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
| `river_water_sediment_deposition__mass` | Total sediment deposition | ton Ītā»Ā¹ |
: {.striped .hover}
